query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_active_devices AS
SELECT
    d.id,
    d.display_name,
    d.default_name,
    d.custom_name,
    d.macaddr,
    d.ipaddr4,
    d.ipaddr6,
    d.device_class,
    d.vendor,
    d.role,
    d.analysis,
    d.analysis_level,
    d.on_watchlist,
    d.critical,
    d.dns_name,
    d.dhcp_name,
    d.cloud_instance_name,
    d.cloud_account,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(d.discover_time / 1000) AS discover_datetime,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(d.last_seen_time / 1000) AS last_seen_datetime,
    d.polled_at
FROM dim_device d
WHERE d.last_seen_time IS NOT NULL;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_device_current_ips AS
SELECT
    d.id AS device_id,
    d.display_name,
    d.macaddr,
    s.ipaddr,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(s.last_observation_time / 1000) AS last_observed_datetime
FROM dim_device d
JOIN snap_device_ipaddr s ON s.device_id = d.id AND s.is_current = TRUE;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_device_group_membership AS
SELECT
    dg.id AS group_id,
    dg.name AS group_name,
    dg.built_in,
    dg.dynamic,
    d.id AS device_id,
    d.display_name AS device_name,
    d.device_class,
    d.role
FROM dim_device_group dg
JOIN bridge_device_device_group b ON b.device_group_id = dg.id
JOIN dim_device d ON d.id = b.device_id;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_alert_summary AS
SELECT
    a.id AS alert_id,
    a.name,
    a.type,
    a.severity,
    a.disabled,
    a.stat_name,
    a.field_name,
    a.operator,
    a.operand,
    a.units,
    a.interval_length,
    a.refire_interval,
    a.apply_all,
    a.polled_at
FROM dim_alert a;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_metric_responses AS
SELECT
    mr.id AS response_id,
    mr.cycle,
    mr.metric_category,
    mr.object_type,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(mr.from_time / 1000) AS from_datetime,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(mr.until_time / 1000) AS until_datetime,
    ms.oid,
    ms.duration,
    ms.values_json,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(ms.stat_time / 1000) AS stat_datetime,
    mr.polled_at
FROM fact_metric_response mr
JOIN fact_metric_stat ms ON ms.metric_response_id = mr.id;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_record_searches AS
SELECT
    rs.id AS search_id,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(rs.from_time / 1000) AS from_datetime,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(rs.until_time / 1000) AS until_datetime,
    rs.total,
    rs.terminated_early,
    rs.lookback_truncated,
    rs.lookback_exceeded,
    r.record_id,
    r.record_type,
    r.appliance_uuid,
    r.source_json,
    rs.polled_at
FROM fact_record_search rs
JOIN fact_record r ON r.search_id = rs.id;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_appliance_overview AS
SELECT
    a.id,
    a.hostname,
    a.display_name,
    a.platform,
    a.firmware_version,
    a.license_status,
    a.connection_type,
    a.manages_local,
    a.managed_by_local,
    a.data_access,
    a.total_capacity,
    a.advanced_analysis_capacity,
    a.nickname,
    a.polled_at
FROM dim_appliance a;
